text: What emotion am I carrying most strongly right now?
What is one thing I am proud of today, however small?
Is there something I need to let go of?
What does my inner voice say when everything is quiet?
What do I need more of in my life right now?
How did I show up for myself today?
What am I avoiding that I know I should face?
If I could tell my past self one thing, what would it be?
